detaileddescription.para: This page provides detailed documentation for the various particle classes used in the bsm_4tops event. These classes inherit from particle_template and define the specific properties and behaviors of each particle type.

sect1.title: Top
sect1.para: The top class represents a top quark in the event.

listitem.para: top(): Initializes the particle type to "top" and defines the data leaves to be read from the input tree.
particle_template* clone(): Creates a new instance of the top particle.
void build(std::map<std::string, particle_template*>* prt, element_t* el): Populates the top particle's properties from the input data.
from_res: A boolean flag indicating if the top quark originates from a resonance.
status: The status code of the top quark from the Monte Carlo truth record.
TruthJets: A vector of truthjet pointers that are associated with this top quark.
Jets: A vector of jet pointers that are associated with this top quark.

sect1.title: Top Children
sect1.para: The top_children class represents the decay products of a top quark.

listitem.para: top_children(): Initializes the particle type to "children" and defines the data leaves. It also sets up a getter function for the from_res attribute.
void get_from_res(bool* val, top_children* prt): A static method that determines if the top child originates from a resonant top quark by checking its parent particles.
particle_template* clone(): Creates a new instance of the top_children particle.
void build(std::map<std::string, particle_template*>* prt, element_t* el): Populates the top_children particle's properties from the input data.
top_index: The index of the parent top quark.
is_lep: A boolean flag indicating if the child is a lepton.
from_res: A boolean flag indicating if the child originates from a resonance (obtained via the get_from_res getter).

sect1.title: Truth Jets
sect1.para: The truthjet class represents a truth-level jet.

listitem.para: truthjet(): Initializes the particle type to "truthjets" and defines the data leaves. It also sets up a getter for the from_res attribute.
void get_from_res(bool* val, truthjet* prt): A static method that determines if the truth jet originates from a resonant top quark by checking its associated tops.
particle_template* clone(): Creates a new instance of the truthjet particle.
void build(std::map<std::string, particle_template*>* prt, element_t* el): Populates the truthjet particle's properties from the input data.
top_index: A vector of indices of the associated top quarks.
top_quark_count: The number of top quarks associated with the jet.
w_boson_count: The number of W bosons associated with the jet.
Parton: A vector of truthjetparton pointers that are constituents of this truth jet.
Tops: A vector of top pointers that this truth jet is associated with.
from_res: A boolean flag indicating if the jet originates from a resonance.

sect1.title: Truth Jet Partons
sect1.para: The truthjetparton class represents a parton associated with a truth jet.

listitem.para: truthjetparton(): Initializes the particle type to "TJparton" and defines the data leaves.
particle_template* clone(): Creates a new instance of the truthjetparton particle.
void build(std::map<std::string, particle_template*>* prt, element_t* el): Populates the truthjetparton particle's properties from the input data.
truthjet_index: The index of the parent truth jet.
topchild_index: A vector of indices of the associated top children.

sect1.title: Jets
sect1.para: The jet class represents a reconstructed jet.

listitem.para: jet(): Initializes the particle type to "jet" and defines the data leaves, including various b-tagging discriminants. It also sets up a getter for the from_res attribute.
void get_from_res(bool* val, jet* prt): A static method that determines if the jet originates from a resonant top quark by checking its associated tops.
particle_template* clone(): Creates a new instance of the jet particle.
void build(std::map<std::string, particle_template*>* prt, element_t* el): Populates the jet particle's properties from the input data.
top_index: A vector of indices of the associated top quarks.
btag_DL1r_60, btag_DL1_60, etc.: Boolean flags for different b-tagging working points.
DL1_b, DL1_c, DL1_u, etc.: The values of the DL1 and DL1r b-tagging discriminants.
is_b: A boolean flag indicating if the jet is b-tagged (using the DL1r 85% working point).
Parton: A vector of jetparton pointers that are constituents of this jet.
Tops: A vector of top pointers that this jet is associated with.
from_res: A boolean flag indicating if the jet originates from a resonance.

sect1.title: Jet Partons
sect1.para: The jetparton class represents a parton associated with a reconstructed jet.

listitem.para: jetparton(): Initializes the particle type to "Jparton" and defines the data leaves.
particle_template* clone(): Creates a new instance of the jetparton particle.
void build(std::map<std::string, particle_template*>* prt, element_t* el): Populates the jetparton particle's properties from the input data.
jet_index: The index of the parent jet.
topchild_index: A vector of indices of the associated top children.

sect1.title: Electron
sect1.para: The electron class represents a reconstructed electron.

listitem.para: electron(): Initializes the particle type to "el" and defines the data leaves.
particle_template* clone(): Creates a new instance of the electron particle.
void build(std::map<std::string, particle_template*>* prt, element_t* el): Populates the electron particle's properties from the input data.
from_res: A boolean indicating if the electron originates from a resonance.
top_index: The index of the parent top quark.

sect1.title: Muon
sect1.para: The muon class represents a reconstructed muon.

listitem.para: muon(): Initializes the particle type to "mu" and defines the data leaves.
particle_template* clone(): Creates a new instance of the muon particle.
void build(std::map<std::string, particle_template*>* prt, element_t* el): Populates the muon particle's properties from the input data.
from_res: A boolean indicating if the muon originates from a resonance.
top_index: The index of the parent top quark.
